{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203161544527473AB61FF30FCE3"}"},"total":5476},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299447197070426895","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，真的就是纯属爽文！有些场景让我笑的阑尾痛，有些场景也能让我揪心，特别是对大长老与主角的情感，不会看腻，因为你永远想象不到下一个场景的剧情，作者大大加油，争取一天十张[害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699535998,"group_id":"7267445495390276648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊且懒，随便写写，真的好无聊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8cLHWJ0nrQNvkncGwRifgABCy6BzpRu/9aKu14RbtZG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4be1416c5d6a4d718e92b642b313050e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705203&x-signature=3ShPu6Da03pys0QEgmoN7jGOsrg%3D","user_id":"1497961162347900","user_name":"无聊的懒狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1497961162347900","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7267445495390276648","book_info":{"abstract":"重生天下第一宗，本该是完美开局。
可楚星河发现，自己的修行之路有点与众不同。
只要毁掉自家宗门就能天下无敌？
建一个天下第一宗不容易，毁掉还不容易？
楚星河发现还真不容易。
为搞垮自家宗门费尽心思，可每一次结果都让宗门变得更强是几个意思？
无数年后，武道最巅峰，楚星河看着在自己的“努力”下无敌于天下的宗门默然无语。
有人问他，是什么让你一路所向披靡走到今日。
楚星河：“我要说我只想毁掉自家宗门你们信吗？”
众人拜服，不破不立，果然昊天帝君的想法不是我们凡人可以参透的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cdba725c80d6e095e0cea20f5182c59c","author":"明月夜色","author_id":"","book_id":"7267445495390276648","book_name":"我一个卧底，让我撑起整个宗门？","book_short_name":"厄运罗盘","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7267445643403067956","read_count":"135500","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"6145162"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1906","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,重生,无敌,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d0ffc98c3ba7bf686623e0de790fff4c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304575&x-signature=GiIJQFXS00KSs9J6FubRFJmB21Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"86118404687","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.462481e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203161544527473AB61FF30FCE3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":89,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11541,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":91192},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7501934870800581401","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哦哦还有深刻体现了一句话“一切发生皆有利于我”。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746688620,"group_id":"7267445495390276648","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3756392467150084"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7267445495390276648","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1147"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读81小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":293186,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7501954402224243481","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实能感受到阴阳互转的反差和对立，所谓气运加身就像正方向起心动念后的心想事成，利他思想也淋漓尽致，楚星河的内心无比纯真幼稚，谦虚不膨胀，总结经验教训，时刻反省，返璞归真像个孩子，重情重义，平等对待众生，潜移默化地告诉大家选择大于努力这个道理，四大洲的和平演变其实也透露出独属于中华文明的大同一统，与西方达尔文主义的强者恃强欺凌弱小不同，昊天宗的目标是成为昊天圣地，作者有点东西，我能理解的就这么多。
